summary: The user discussed organizing their bookshelf and creating a cozy reading nook in their living room. They recently rearranged their furniture, added a new lamp with a USB port from IKEA, and ordered new throw pillows that match their decor, enhancing their living space.
facts: The user rearranged their living room furniture about three weeks ago and created a cozy reading nook with an armchair and a floor lamp. The user replaced the table lamp on their coffee table with a new one from IKEA two weekends ago, which has a USB port for charging devices. The user ordered new throw pillows for their couch online last week, which arrived yesterday and match the rug and wallpaper perfectly. The user enjoys spending more time in their living room since the furniture rearrangement and the addition of the reading nook. The user finds the USB port on their new lamp convenient for charging their phone or tablet while watching TV.
